description: Style NoteWhen slip-on loafers for women were all the rage - did you ever wonder if they were a tad too boring? These slip-ons from carlton london feature cheetah print on faux animal hair at the toe region with a classic link strap across the foot. The print is balanced by the pair's sober colouring. Best worn with tonal slim Fit formal trousers and a satin shirt. Product Details Cream slip-ons with cheetah print on the toe regionMetal link across the toe box Ruffled stitch detail at the seams of the toe boxSoft footbedSmooth TPU outsole, slightly raised at the heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust, grime or dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
